articles.title: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to September 15, 2013
articles.excerpt: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: Matka King Release Date: Vijay Varma Prime Video 2026
articles.excerpt: Prime Video announces April 17 as the release date for Matka King, a gritty drama series starring Vijay Varma set in 1960s Bombay. The show will be available to all Prime Video subscribers in the US at no additional cost. If you love period dramas and Bollywood originals, mark this as a must-watch for April 2026.

articles.title: Touch Buddy Song Out Now: Dacoit's New Bollywood Dance Track 2026
articles.excerpt: The highly anticipated 'Touch Buddy' from Dacoit, featuring Pawan Singh, Jonita Gandhi, and Adivi Sesh, is now streaming and delivering the high-energy dance track fans expected. The song is available on Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, and YouTube, making it easy for US-based viewers to access this latest release from new Bollywood movies in 2026.

articles.title: Virat Kohli IPL 2026: 120% Commitment Half-Century vs SRH
articles.excerpt: Virat Kohli blazed back into IPL 2026 action with a dominant half-century as RCB dismantled SRH in their season opener. His "120% commitment" approach set the template for a season where this franchise could finally challenge for the title, with fans across the US able to catch highlights and live scores through multiple streaming options.

articles.title: IPL 2025: Too Much Cricket? Shane Watson's Bold Take
articles.excerpt: KKR's Shane Watson just dropped a controversial take: the IPL suffers because there's too much cricket on the calendar, and he's not a fan of the Impact Player rule either. For US-based Indian cricket fans, this matters because an oversaturated schedule dilutes the quality of the cricket you're staying up late to watch. Here's what Watson means and where to watch IPL 2025 from America.

articles.title: Kohli's 69 Off 38 Balls Powers RCB IPL 2026 Win vs SRH
articles.excerpt: Virat Kohli's explosive unbeaten 69 off 38 balls powered RCB to a commanding 23-run victory over SRH in the IPL 2026 opener, proving he can elevate his strike rate whenever needed. For US-based Indian cricket fans, this was the perfect tournament opener to watch—and our guide shows you exactly how to catch all the action live without missing a beat.

articles.title: Postcards from Hong Kong: Ridhi Dogra's New Travel Series on Hotstar 2026
articles.excerpt: Bollywood star Ridhi Dogra fronts National Geographic's new two-episode travel series Postcards from Hong Kong, premiering March 28 on JioHotstar. The documentary explores Hong Kong beyond its iconic skyline with authentic stories and local experiences — perfect for Indian diaspora audiences seeking quality content. Stream it now on JioHotstar Premium ($5.99/month) in the US.

articles.title: IPL 2025 Opening Night: RCB vs SRH at Chinnaswamy Stadium
articles.excerpt: IPL 2025 kicked off at the historic M. Chinnaswamy Stadium with RCB taking on SRH in a thrilling opener that reminded us why we lose sleep for India cricket. Key performances from Virat Kohli and Abhishek Sharma, plus your complete guide to catching IPL 2025 matches from the US.

articles.title: MS Dhoni IPL 2026: Calf Strain Sidelines Cricket Legend
articles.excerpt: MS Dhoni's calf strain has sidelined the CSK captain for IPL 2026's opening two weeks. The legendary wicketkeeper will undergo rehabilitation while CSK tests its bench strength. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this impacts IPL viewing schedules and raises questions about Dhoni's availability for India's upcoming international commitments later in 2026.

articles.title: Project Hail Mary Gets All 34 IMAX Screens in India 2026
articles.excerpt: Fan power just secured Project Hail Mary on all 34 IMAX screens in India after Sony Pictures initially landed only 6. Mumbai's Eros Cinema added a rare 3:45 AM weekend show, proving audience demand drives theatrical strategy. Streaming comes later; catch it in IMAX now.

articles.title: Mohanlal Gets Delhi Court Protection for Personality Rights 2026
articles.excerpt: Malayalam star Mohanlal just won interim protection for his personality rights from India's Delhi High Court—a landmark ruling that affects how streaming platforms handle celebrity images across Netflix, Prime, and Hotstar. This strengthens legal protections for all Indian actors in the digital age and ensures more authentic content for diaspora audiences.

articles.title: AI Gender Gap 2026: How It's Affecting Your Tech Career
articles.excerpt: New data shows AI adoption is widening the gender gap in tech—but Indian engineers who master AI tools for developers, learn fairness/bias concepts, and position themselves as AI architects (not replacements) are securing premium salaries and job security. Your move: skill up in prompt engineering and responsible AI now; it's worth 15-22% more in machine learning salaries.

articles.title: Real Estate Stock Crash 2026: Should Tech Professionals Invest Now?
articles.excerpt: Real estate stocks have crashed 22-32% in 2026 due to IT layoffs and geopolitical tensions. Indian tech professionals should consider selective purchases of quality large-cap players, with April's RBI MPC meeting serving as a key decision point that could trigger a recovery in valuations and mortgage affordability.

articles.title: AI in Education: Global Strategies & Your Career Impact 2026
articles.excerpt: Global governments are finalizing AI-in-education policies faster than before. For Indian tech professionals in the US, this creates opportunities in EdTech ML roles—especially if you understand both policy and code. Machine learning salaries in education are rising for specialized engineers who can handle privacy, compliance, and ChatGPT alternatives.

articles.title: Australia Cricket Crisis: IPL Money Threatening Test Cricket 2026
articles.excerpt: Australia's captain is warning that franchise cricket money—especially from the IPL—is pulling players away from Test cricket contracts. If Cricket Australia can't compete financially with the IPL, their national teams will suffer, potentially weakening future India vs Australia test series and threatening the survival of Test cricket globally.

articles.title: Thushara Fails IPL 2026 Fitness Test, RCB Denied NOC
articles.excerpt: Sri Lankan pacer Thushara has been blocked from joining RCB for IPL 2026 after failing BCCI's mandatory fitness test. Meanwhile, KKR's Pathirana and LSG's Hasaranga are still awaiting their test results, making this a developing story that could reshape the entire IPL 2026 season for overseas player availability.

articles.title: Project Hail Mary IMAX Screens India 2025: What Happened?
articles.excerpt: Project Hail Mary secured only 6 of India's 34 IMAX screens due to competition from Dhurandhar The Revenge's blockbuster success. The film will likely stream on Netflix, Prime Video, or Disney+ Hotstar within 60 days of theatrical release. US-based Indian diaspora audiences can expect high-quality sci-fi content even if it skips premium formats.

articles.title: Australia's Molineux Shines Beyond Bowling in West Indies Tour 2026
articles.excerpt: Australia's coaching staff has discovered that Josh Molineux offers massive value beyond his bowling statistics—his captaincy and leadership potential during the West Indies tour have impressed ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026. As India cricket scores dominate headlines and the India vs Australia rivalry intensifies, Australia's focus on developing smarter leaders (not just skilled bowlers) could be the edge they need in upcoming tournaments.

articles.title: Toaster: Rajkummar Rao Netflix Dark Comedy April 15, 2026
articles.excerpt: Toaster, a dark comedy starring Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra, drops on Netflix April 15, 2026. This quirky Netflix India original turns a wedding gift into an instrument of chaos. Streaming in the US now requires only a Netflix subscription—perfect for NRIs seeking experimental Indian cinema beyond traditional Bollywood.

articles.title: India Cricket 2026-27: Zimbabwe Tour Returns After 24 Years
articles.excerpt: Zimbabwe cricket returns to India for the first bilateral tour since 2002 during an action-packed 2026-27 season. Bengaluru is hosting matches, offering convenient US viewing times for NRI fans tracking every India cricket score.

articles.title: Australia Cricket Crisis: IPL Money Luring Players Away in 2026
articles.excerpt: Australia's captain warns that IPL and franchise cricket are tempting players with sums Cricket Australia can't match—risking an exodus that weakens Test cricket and international competition. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this means potentially weaker opponents for India, reshaping the global cricket landscape as financial power shifts from national boards to T20 leagues.

articles.title: Seema Sajdeh The Traitors Season 2 India 2026
articles.excerpt: Seema Sajdeh from Fabulous Lives of Bollywood Wives is being considered for The Traitors India Season 2, Netflix's hit reality psychological thriller format. The show, which begins filming later in 2026, is expected to premiere in late 2026 and will stream globally on Netflix—making it accessible to Indian diaspora viewers across the US.

articles.title: Kleiner Perkins $3.5B AI Fund: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
articles.excerpt: Kleiner Perkins' $3.5B AI fund signals a massive hiring surge for AI-skilled engineers starting mid-2026. Machine learning salaries are about to rise, and ChatGPT alternatives will compete for dominance. Indian engineers should start learning Claude and Llama now—skills in these tools become job-market essentials.

articles.title: Drone Tech for Police: Game-Changer for Public Safety Jobs [2026]
articles.excerpt: Brinc launched a 911 drone to replace police helicopters, creating immediate demand for ML, robotics, and backend engineers. Indian tech professionals can pivot into this high-pay public safety sector ($140K–$240K for mid-senior roles) by building drone + ML projects now. This is one of the few AI growth areas not threatened by ChatGPT alternatives.

articles.title: Coney & Tiffen NZC Hall of Fame 2026: Cricket Legends Honored
articles.excerpt: New Zealand cricket icons Coney and Tiffen have been inducted into the prestigious NZC Hall of Fame, with their formal ceremony happening at the New Zealand Cricket Awards. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this honor highlights how cricket's greatest achievements transcend borders, reminding us that excellence in the sport comes from every nation and era.

articles.title: RCB Sold for $1.78B: What It Means for IPL 2025 & India Cricket
articles.excerpt: Royal Challengers Bangalore has been sold to a consortium of Aditya Birla Group and Times of India for $1.78 billion—the largest IPL franchise valuation ever. The deal explicitly includes both men's and women's teams, signaling major investment in women's cricket and suggesting expanded media coverage for US-based Indian cricket fans in IPL 2025.

articles.title: Spencer Johnson Replaces Ellis at CSK for IPL 2025 Season
articles.excerpt: Spencer Johnson, Australian pace bowler, replaces injured Ellis at CSK for IPL 2025's final stages (arriving late April). After a year-long back injury absence, Johnson's comeback carries both tactical advantage (left-arm pace) and fitness questions for the reigning champions' playoff push.

articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Jumps +304 Days to Jul 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date jumps +304 days to July 15, 2014. EB-3 India holds at November 15, 2013. DFF authorized — EB-2 & EB-3 Dates for Filing both advance to January 15, 2015.

articles.title: Khana Dil Se: Hansal Mehta's AI Culinary Series 2025
articles.excerpt: Hansal Mehta's groundbreaking AI-led culinary series Khana Dil Se launches in 2025, merging India's food heritage with artificial intelligence. It's streaming availability is pending official announcement, likely on Netflix or Disney+ Hotstar for US diaspora audiences.

articles.title: India Cricket Squad 2026: Kashvee Gautam & Anushka Sharma picked for South Africa T20I tour
articles.excerpt: India's women's cricket team has selected newcomers Kashvee Gautam and Anushka Sharma for the South Africa T20I tour, marking an exciting generational shift. The squad drops experienced players like Amanjot Kaur, signaling selectors' commitment to building future-focused talent. US-based Indian cricket fans should start tracking these rising stars—they could shape India's women's cricket for years to come.

articles.title: Alaya F Addresses Cosmetic Surgery Rumors After Fashion Week 2026
articles.excerpt: Alaya F denied cosmetic surgery rumors after her Lakmé Fashion Week appearance, crediting her look to professional makeup and styling. The incident highlights ongoing beauty standard discussions in Bollywood as the industry continues evolving in 2025-2026.

articles.title: Payne Replaces Edwards at Sunrisers Hyderabad IPL 2026
articles.excerpt: Sunrisers Hyderabad has signed England's Will Payne (35) to replace Reece Edwards for IPL 2026, banking on Payne's recent ILT20 and BBL championship wins. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this is a strategic move showing franchises prioritize experience in T20 cricket. Expect SRH to be contenders next season with this bowling addition.

articles.title: AI Tools for Building Energy Optimization: 2026 Guide
articles.excerpt: AI-driven building energy optimization is a growing, policy-backed field offering Indian tech professionals competitive salaries, long-term stability, and clearer visa pathways than consumer AI roles. Learning the domain takes 2–3 months; entry points exist for ML engineers, data engineers, and backend developers. Unlike ChatGPT alternatives, this space has sustained 10+ year demand from regulatory compliance and climate targets.

articles.title: What Bernie Sanders' AI Video Reveals About Chatbot Limitations
articles.excerpt: A recent viral video attempting to expose AI system behavior actually revealed how chatbots are designed to be agreeable—a critical insight for tech professionals. For Indian engineers working on AI products, understanding prompt engineering, AI safety testing, and behavioral design is now essential career knowledge that employers actively hire for.

articles.title: Zipline's $200M Funding: What Drone Delivery Means for Your Tech Career
articles.excerpt: Zipline's $200M funding validates drone delivery as a major growth sector, creating significant hiring opportunities for Indian tech professionals in AI, cloud infrastructure, and robotics. This is a genuine career opportunity with competitive US-level salaries, especially for engineers with skills in machine learning, DevOps, and autonomous systems.
